info.title: Evervault API
info.description: Evervault provides encryption, decryption, relay proxying, payment card processing, network tokenization, and webhook management.

post.description: Encrypt the values of a JSON object or file.
Decrypt the values of a JSON object or file.
Perform AVS, ANI, and CVV verification checks.
Perform a BIN lookup for a card number.

basicAuth.description: Use app ID as username and API key as password.
